payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is marked as superseded by mem_new, so it should not be shown as a current fact.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching Sam from Goldman. Recall filtered mem_old because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The query refers to Sam from Goldman; mem_new and mem_old both concern that same entity context, but only mem_new is current.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new is the active memory for Sam from Goldman and was eligible to be returned.
mem_old was not returned because it is superseded by mem_new.

details: Did not present superseded mem_old as current.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise its supersession metadata.
If mem_new is incorrect, update or supersede mem_new with a corrected memory.
If Sam from Goldman was matched to the wrong entity, split or relink the entity records.
